description_long: This is an ornate metal crucifix sculpture featuring intricate scrollwork and decorative flourishes at the ends of the cross. At the intersection of the cross, a detailed figure of Jesus Christ is affixed, with arms outstretched and head bowed, typical of a traditional Christian crucifix. The cross itself is adorned with symmetrical, curling motifs that add a sense of elegance and craftsmanship. The surface appears to be dark, likely painted or oxidized metal, giving it a somber and dignified appearance. The sculpture is relatively slender in profile, with the figure of Christ providing the main three-dimensional depth. Such a piece would commonly be found in religious or memorial urban settings, such as cemeteries, churchyards, or public squares.
description: An ornate metal crucifix with intricate scrollwork and a detailed figure of Jesus Christ affixed to the cross, finished in a dark metallic tone.
description_view_0: A top-down view highlighting the symmetrical scrollwork and decorative ends of the cross, with the figure of Christ less visible.
description_view_1: A side profile showing the slenderness of the cross and the three-dimensional projection of the Christ figure.
description_view_2: A frontal view clearly displaying the figure of Jesus Christ on the cross and the ornate details of the cross's face.
description_view_3: An angled side view emphasizing the depth of the Christ figure and the layered scrollwork of the cross.
attribute_subject_matter: Jesus Christ crucifixion on an ornate cross
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible, but the sculpture is typical of those found in outdoor religious or memorial urban environments.
